query:
-- Check invoice FAC-2026-0004
SELECT id, invoiceNumber, status, reservationId, amountTotal, itemsJson 
FROM invoices 
WHERE invoiceNumber = 'FAC-2026-0004';

-- Check reservation 480001
SELECT id, status, channel, productId, productName, amountTotal, paidAt, bookingDate
FROM reservations
WHERE id = 480001;
